_style: 儿童 App UI 素材, painterly children book illustration, 温暖配色（赭石、琥珀、柔和粉橙）, 柔和阴影, ⚠️纯白色背景 pure white background, 居中构图, 单一动作场景, 正方形, 无任何文字

chunks.subject: a baby piglet proudly holding up a small green toy dinosaur with both hands as if introducing a beloved friend, warm affectionate mood
a baby piglet hugging one special green dinosaur toy tightly while other toys lie ignored on the ground nearby, a heart above the chosen toy
a baby piglet pushing a green dinosaur toy forward playfully toward a girl piglet who jumps back with wide surprised eyes, a small startle burst between them
a sleepy baby piglet tucked under a blanket in bed hugging a green dinosaur toy, a crescent moon and stars in the window, peaceful bedtime
a small green dinosaur toy flying high up in the air above a piglet's raised hands, upward motion arc and motion lines, the toy near the top
a green dinosaur toy dropping down from the sky into a piglet's open waiting arms below, downward motion lines and arrows, the catch about to happen
a crying baby piglet with empty open hands and tears, a faint outline of a missing green dinosaur toy with a question mark, sense of loss
a kind father pig kneeling down with a reassuring hand on a small crying piglet's shoulder, gentle comforting smile, calming gesture
a father pig and a girl piglet looking forward with determined hopeful faces, the girl holding a magnifying glass, ready to search together
a girl piglet wearing a detective deerstalker hat holding a magnifying glass standing confidently, a spotlight on her, ready-for-the-case pose
a girl piglet with a magnifying glass happily spotting a hidden object on the ground, a sparkle of discovery, confident clever expression
a girl piglet with one finger pointing up and a bright glowing lightbulb above her head, eyes confident with a sudden idea, knowing smile
a green dinosaur toy floating among bubbles in a white bathtub, rubber duck nearby, steam rising, no characters
a green dinosaur toy resting on a pillow under a blanket in a small child's bed, cozy bedroom, no characters
a girl piglet detective with magnifying glass stepping into a sunny green garden with flowers and a tree, searching pose
a girl piglet pointing excitedly up at a green dinosaur toy stuck high in the branches of a leafy tree, eyes wide with discovery
a father pig giving a proud thumbs up to a happy girl piglet wearing a detective hat, sparkles of praise around them

chunks.text: so happy to have him back
chunks.subject: a baby piglet beaming with joy hugging a green dinosaur toy tightly, hearts and sparkles bursting around, reunited happiness
